gt_sql: SELECT CommentCount, AnswerCount FROM posts WHERE Title = 'Clustering 1D data'
pred_sql:
SELECT 
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comments WHERE PostId = p.Id) AS CommentCount,
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM posts WHERE ParentId = p.Id AND PostTypeId = 2) AS AnswerCount
FROM posts p
WHERE TRIM(Title) = 'Clustering 1D data'
LIMIT 1;
question: How many comments and answers were left by the users on the post with the title 'Clustering 1D data'?
